sourceNote: MVP educational summary based on public election-process material from ECI, NVSP, and data.gov.in.

steps.title: Registration
steps.description: Eligible citizens submit or update their voter information so their names appear on the electoral roll.
points: Track the application until the roll entry is updated.

steps.title: Verification
steps.description: Election officials verify voter details and voters confirm their polling information before voting day.
points: Confirm name, address, and polling station.
Resolve errors through official correction services.

steps.title: Voting Day
steps.description: Voters arrive at the assigned polling station, complete identity checks, and cast their vote.
points: Join the queue at the assigned booth.
Cast the vote privately and securely.

steps.title: Result
steps.description: Votes are counted and results are declared after official procedures are completed.
points: Candidates and representatives may observe the process.
Final results are published by the election authority.
